mapper.select: SELECT n.*, u.email as authorEmail FROM notice n JOIN users u ON n.author_id = u.id ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
SELECT n.*, u.email as authorEmail FROM notice n JOIN users u ON n.author_id = u.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, author_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
